topic: I found my grandfather's old camcorder and the last recording is from after his death
title: I Found My Grandfather's Old Camcorder and the Last Recording Is From After His Death | True Scary Story

scenes.narration: My grandfather passed in March of two thousand nine. Heart failure.
scenes.image_prompt: interior wide shot of a cluttered attic in afternoon light, cardboard boxes and plastic storage bins stacked along sloped walls, a small round window at the far end letting in pale light, dust in the air, old furniture draped in sheets, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: We cleaned out his house in June.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a modest living room being cleared out, cardboard boxes stacked near the door, a bookshelf half-emptied, afternoon light through curtain sheers, no people in frame, a stack of photo albums on the coffee table, vertical 9:16 framing

close shot of an early 2000s Sony Handycam camcorder in a worn black carrying case sitting on a car seat, the case unzipped slightly showing the camera inside, afternoon light through the car window, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I found the tape this past August.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a small MiniDV cassette tape in a hand, the tape slightly dusty, the label area blank except for a sticker with a date written in ballpoint pen, ambient indoor light, vertical 9:16 framing

extreme close up of the small flip screen of an early 2000s camcorder showing a date stamp on the bottom of the frame, the screen glowing in dim ambient light, the rest of the camera in shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

close shot of a sympathy card lying on a kitchen table, the card open showing a handwritten date and a few lines of text not legible, a pen resting beside it, soft kitchen window light, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The footage showed his living room.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a small camcorder screen showing video footage of an empty living room interior, an armchair visible, afternoon light through curtains, the room exactly as it was when occupied but now clearly empty, scan artifacts on the small screen, vertical 9:16 framing

close shot of a camcorder flip screen showing footage of a worn armchair next to a floor lamp, a side table with a glass of water on it, the image slightly washed out from the small screen, room in background out of focus, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Then someone walked slowly past the window. Outside.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a camcorder screen showing footage of a living room window, curtains slightly parted, the silhouette of a person walking past outside the glass visible for just a moment, the figure blurred and dark, ambient indoor light around the screen, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: Same gait. Same cardigan. He had been buried in that cardigan six weeks before.
scenes.image_prompt: close shot of a framed photograph on a wooden shelf showing an older man seated in a chair wearing a dark patterned cardigan, the photo slightly faded, a small vase beside it, soft shelf light, no face clearly visible, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: I watched it twice. Same thing both times.
scenes.image_prompt: wide shot of a dark living room at night, a person sitting on a couch with their back to camera watching a small camcorder propped on a coffee table, the flip screen casting a faint light on the surrounding area, the rest of the room in shadow, vertical 9:16 framing

scenes.narration: The camcorder is in a box in my car. I have not driven that car in four months.
scenes.image_prompt: wide exterior shot of a dark sedan parked in a driveway at night, all windows closed, a motion-sensor porch light nearby lit as if something nearby triggered it, no people visible, slight fog, vertical 9:16 framing
